name: DKG Node UI Bridge
description: Connects a local OpenClaw agent to a DKG V10 node for node-backed chat, memory, and agent-network capabilities.

enabled.description: Register the DKG memory-slot capability (slot-backed recall via registerMemoryCapability) and the dkg_memory_import write tool on attach.

memory.description: DKG memory integration. Memory now flows exclusively through api.registerMemoryCapability for slot-backed recall reads and through the dkg_memory_import tool for explicit per-project writes; the retired memoryDir / watchDebounceMs / file-watcher-sync configuration surface is no longer accepted.

enabled.description: Enable DKG UI to OpenClaw chat bridge

port.description: Standalone bridge port when gateway route registration is unavailable
